title: How do I switch the first column (the item name) with another column?
excerpt: I do not see a way that I could switch which of the columns is the ‘primary’ column.

posts.author: Ophir_meyuchas (Ophir Meyuchas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I do not see a way that I could switch which of the columns is the ‘primary’ column.

image1621×164 14.3 KB

posts.author: lindsay-monday.com (Lindsay Mayrose)
posts.cookedHtml: @Ophir_meyuchas Since the first column is fixed and meant to be the item name rather than a specific column type, there’s not a way to make another column the first column or to change its type. This would need to be done manually at this time!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
